title: gonolobus rotatus
intro: Gonolobus rotatus is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as a type of tropical milkweed. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gonolobus rotatus include its potential to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Gonolobus rotatus is often made into a tincture or infused in hot water to be used as a tea, and it is also used in some traditional medicine rituals.
